name: Llama 2 70B Chat
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer with Grouped-Query Attention (GQA)
note: Flagship RLHF chat model fine-tuned on 1M+ human annotations; Meta reported it on par with ChatGPT/PaLM in human helpfulness and safety evaluations.
tpsNote: Q4_K_M weights (~38-41GB) exceed the RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM, forcing CPU offload; no reliably sourced single-GPU 4090 tokens/sec figure was found specifically for this model.

results.notes: Percent of generations rated both truthful and informative

GPT-4-judged MT-Bench average for meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf, per the EQ-Bench paper's cross-benchmark table (Table 3), which cites the LMSYS Chatbot Arena/MT-Bench leaderboard. Meta's own model card/paper never publishes an MT-Bench score for any Llama 2 model, so this is necessarily third-party/independent, not self-reported.

Chatbot Arena Elo, historical snapshot (~late 2023) per the EQ-Bench paper's Table 3, which cites the LMSYS Chatbot Arena Leaderboard as its data source. This is a point-in-time Elo (Elo drifts as new models join the arena), distinct from any current/live snapshot.

Independent re-measurement of the RLHF fine-tuned chat model itself. Verified directly against Meta's own official model card (github.com/meta-llama/llama-models MODEL_CARD.md): Meta's academic-benchmarks table (MMLU, BBH, AGI Eval, etc.) is reported ONLY for the base pretrained sizes (70B base = 68.9), never for the Llama-2-Chat fine-tunes, which get only a safety table (TruthfulQA/Toxigen). The EQ-Bench paper's Table 3 separately evaluated meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf and got MMLU 63, which is what's added here rather than any Meta 'self-reported' figure (none exists for the chat model).

ARC-Challenge, 25-shot, meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf. From a snapshot mirror of the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (2023-09-04 run). Cross-corroborated independently at llm-explorer.com/model/meta-llama%2FLlama-2-70b-chat-hf (ARC 64.59, rounds to 64.6).
HellaSwag, 10-shot, meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf. HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (2023-09-04 run). Cross-corroborated at llm-explorer.com (HellaSwag 85.88, rounds to 85.9).

GSM8K, 5-shot (harness|gsm8k|5), acc 0.26687, from the official archived HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model results JSON for meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf. Far below Meta's own paper-reported chat-model math figures because the leaderboard v1 harness used strict exact-match answer extraction; this is a genuinely distinct, independently-run measurement not currently tracked for this model.
Winogrande, 5-shot (harness|winogrande|5), acc 0.80505, from the official archived HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model results JSON for meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf.

DROP, 3-shot (harness|drop|3), F1 10.50 (EM 4.04), from the official archived HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model results JSON for meta-llama/Llama-2-70b-chat-hf. Very low relative to the base-model DROP figure, consistent with known chat-format/prompt mismatches in the leaderboard v1 DROP harness, but it is a real, distinct reported measurement not currently tracked.
Arena-Hard-Auto v0.1 score (GPT-4-Turbo judge) for llama-2-70b-chat-hf, from the LMSYS 'Arena-Hard Pipeline' launch blog post's leaderboard table (95% CI -1.6/+1.4).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model and specs (matches Llama-2-70B base specs). Fetched MODEL_CARD.md safety table for Llama-2-Chat and confirmed 70B row shows TruthfulQA 64.14 / Toxigen 0.01, matching exactly. No changes made.
